title: Lesser & Pavey Desire Aroma Amber & Sandalwood Diffuser 80ml For Home Fragrance | Lovely Air Freshener For Stress Relief & Calm Mind | Aromatherapy Diffusers Gift For Women & Men
features: SOOTHING ROOM FRAGRANCE DIFFUSER FOR HOME: This elegant reed diffuser fills your space with calming room fragrance, ideal for daily relaxation, stress relief, or creating a pleasant ambiance in any room.
STYLISH AIR FRESHENER FOR STRESS RELIEF: Designed as a chic air freshener for home, this scent diffuser enhances your home décor while offering continuous fragrance through natural diffuser sticks.

PREMIUM QUALITY DIFFUSER WITH REEDS INCLUDED: Features high-quality fragrance oil and natural reeds for diffusers that offer long-lasting aroma and an effective scent delivery system without electricity or flames.

LOVELY ROOM DIFFUSER FOR HOME & OFFICE USE: A great addition to bedrooms, living rooms, or workspaces, this air freshener diffuser helps freshen indoor spaces and eliminate odours with effortless style.

PERFECT GIFT FOR WOMEN & MEN FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Comes in beautifully designed packaging, making it a thoughtful diffuser gift set for women and men alike—ideal for birthdays, holidays, or housewarming.
description: Product Description AMBER&SANDALWOOD DIFFUSER 80ML Directions Insert the reeds into the bottle containing the fragrance oil. Flip the reeds occasionally to refresh the scent. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
